name: reported_date_present
expression: reported_date IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(reported_date)) > 0
description: reported_date is required for First Notice of Loss extraction.

name: policy_number_present
expression: policy_number IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(policy_number)) > 0
description: policy_number is required for First Notice of Loss extraction.

name: loss_date_present
expression: loss_date IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(loss_date)) > 0
description: loss_date is required for First Notice of Loss extraction.

name: loss_description_present
expression: loss_description IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(loss_description)) > 0
description: loss_description is required for First Notice of Loss extraction.

name: estimated_loss_amount_non_negative
description: estimated_loss_amount should be non-negative when present.
